description: Mythar Living Lexicon v1.3 — gap-fill clusters 12–95 with atomic roots, compounds, Proto-World universals (proposals K–M), Polysemy Governance Contract (PGC), CRA governance metadata, and domain tags. Core expansion frozen — prioritize docs/conformance/tooling.

cel_binding.how_to_bind: On FAC-E seed, record CEL evidence entries with subject_id equal to each root/cluster evidence_id; then set cel_lineage.cel_entry_id and binding_status=bound. See CEL Charter and scripts/run_local.py --show-cel.

expansion_policy.note: Core lexicon expansion is frozen. Prefer CRA/PGC conformance, documentation, and reproducibility tooling over admitting new roots or clusters unless a governance exception is recorded in CEL.

contract.rule: Polysemy requires a shared semantic axis
Axes must be explicit in the lexicon entry
Axes must be constitutional (vowel-core / consonant-force semantics)
Axes must be testable (cluster where both senses appear without contradiction)
No axis → no polysemy (split or remove weaker sense)

polysemy_governance.rule: Polysemy is permitted only where the senses share a documented semantic axis.

allowed.rationale: Fire = intense energy; sacred-verity = pure truth on intensity→purity
Rest-flow and blood share the flow→life-flow continuum
Animal = entity defined by autonomous motion
Big → great → many on one magnitude continuum
Mother as origin of life; life as origin principle
Hand ↔ give-take on agency axis; stone → ska / krato (PGC-5 split)
Demonstrative only; foot/stand → pe / taga (PGC-5 split)
Weight-burden axis only; two → duma (PGC-5 split)
Size-class diminutive; independent child root is chi

corrections.action: Stone sense removed; stone lives at ska / krato
ta = demonstrative only; foot/stand at pe / taga
du = burden only; two/dual at duma

proposals.G: Blessing / birth triad (tiki / yocfua / manalara — cluster 48)
